summary: Warm soundboard recording captures a solid show highlighted by standout second‑set gems like Scarlet > Fire and a killer Jack Straw first‑set finish.
review: The recording offers a warm, clear mix thanks to Charlie’s sound adjustments, making the band’s tight playing shine throughout. Fans rave about the second set—Scarlet Begonias into Fire on the Mountain, C.C. Rider, Ramble On Rose and the Estimated Prophet > Eyes of the World sequence—while the first‑set Jack Straw ender is singled out as a high point. Overall the performance is judged solid to excellent with only minor grading nuances.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently strong positive comments about both musical performance and recording quality across five reviews; minor mixed note does not outweigh overall enthusiasm.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Warm, clear mix with balanced instruments; Charlie’s sound adjustments are praised, no major drop‑outs or distortion reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set builds nicely and ends with a memorable Jack Straw; second set delivers a string of classics and seamless transitions, keeping the energy high throughout.

band_member_comments.Drums: Drums/Space segment noted as part of the second‑set flow; no specific performance critique offered.
